mappings.rationaleAI: Heredity and trait transmission are the genetic basis for the continuity of life.
Genetics, a major branch of biology, studies heredity and the transmission of traits across generations.
Heredity and genetic variation are the raw materials upon which evolutionary selection acts to transmit and modify traits.
Natural selection acts on heritable traits, connecting to the transmission of hereditary information.
Genetics studies heredity and the transmission of traits as covered in this section.
The gene is the fundamental unit of heredity and trait transmission treated in this section.
Heredity and the transmission of traits are the direct subject of this section.
DNA carries hereditary information and is the molecular basis of trait transmission.
RNA plays a central role in heredity by translating genetic information into proteins.
